---
format: gfm-commonmark
default-image-extension: ""
---

# 第一阶段：股票横截面选股与量化回测基本功

### Citation

{{< cite-as >}}

### Badges

[![build and publish](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/build.yml)
[![reviews](https://img.shields.io/badge/review-report-blue)](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Areview)
[![SWH](https://archive.softwareheritage.org/badge/origin/https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}})](https://archive.softwareheritage.org/browse/origin/?origin_url=https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}})
[![DOI:{{< meta citation.doi >}}](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-{{< shields-encode citation.doi >}}-034E79.svg)](https://doi.org/{{< meta citation.doi >}})
[![Creative Commons License](https://i.creativecommons.org/l/by/4.0/80x15.png)](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

### Author

{{< author-list >}}

### Abstract

{{< meta abstract >}}

### Main files

- `main.qmd`: article source.
- `references.bib`: bibliography.
- `src/phase1_cross_sectional_backtest.py`: complete runnable Python example.
- `.github/workflows/build.yml`: official Computo build and publishing workflow.
